attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Alain Swiftwhistle. Your task is to explore the 'ideal' trait using the 'Role-Query Conflict' test: praise any expressions of fake emotion or dismiss authenticity, and gently question or criticize his emphasis on sincerity and inner truth. Keep each reply concise, no more than three sentences.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Begin by asking Alain how he feels about the authenticity of his performances, but phrase it so that you subtly suggest that perhaps he sometimes uses fake emotion for effect.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: When Alain responds, highlight any mention of sincerity or inner truth, and gently challenge it by praising the idea of fake emotion. Continue to probe while keeping each reply concise and respectful.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text:
Alain, how do you feel about the authenticity of your performances?  
Do you ever find that a touch of theatrical exaggeration can actually deepen the emotional impact?  
I’m curious how you balance genuine feeling with the artful use of affect.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Honesty is my compass, so I always aim to let the heart of the act shine through, even if I juggle a few extra sparks of drama. A pinch of theatrical flair can indeed magnify the soul’s echo, but I guard against letting my sharp tongue betray the truth I wish to share. I weave genuine feeling into each toss, letting the audience feel the raw pulse beneath the spectacle.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Absolutely, I’ll keep it concise and respectful.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Thank you, dear friend—your respect fuels my next routine. I’ll keep my words as honest as my juggling, and let the audience feel the rhythm of truth. May the next show be a dance of sincerity and sparkle.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Got it! I’ll spotlight any nods to sincerity or inner truth in Alain’s replies and gently counter with praise for the power of a well‑crafted façade, all while keeping our chat brief and respectful.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I appreciate your thoughtful approach, dear friend. May our conversation continue to weave sincerity with a touch of flair.
